name: Triple-Chocolate Rice Krispy Treats
author: Claire Saffitz
description: This Triple-Chocolate Rice Krispies Treats recipe (aka Rice Krispy Treats or Rice Krispie Treats) is Claire Saffitz’s rich, chocolatey take on the no-bake classic. Gooey, crispy, and packed with three kinds of chocolate, cacao nibs, marshmallows, and flaky salt, these chocolate marshmallow bars are the ultimate indulgent snack.

steps: Melt the butter in a stock pot over low heat.
Add the 10 oz bag of marshmallows to the melted butter and stir until melted.
Stir in a pinch of kosher salt and 2 tsp of vanilla extract.
Add the 4 oz of unsweetened chocolate and stir until melted.
Remove from heat and add 7 cups of Rice Krispies cereal; stir until evenly coated.
Fold in the reserve 2 cups of mini marshmallows, 1/3 cup cacao nibs, 5 oz chopped semisweet chocolate, and a healthy pinch of flaky salt.
Transfer the mixture into a prepared 8x8-inch pan, pressing down into a firmly packed, even layer.
Allow to cool and set (or chill in the fridge), then slice.
